name: hoc/empty-state
description: A composite placeholder component shown when a list, table, or page has no data to display. Combines an icon (or illustration), a title, a description, and an optional primary action button in a centered layout. Provides EmptyState, EmptyStateIcon, EmptyStateTitle, EmptyStateDescription, and EmptyStateAction primitives with theme-aware muted colors and responsive spacing.
useCases: Search result pages with no matches, offering a 'Clear filters' action to reset the query
Empty inboxes or notification centers encouraging users to start a conversation or subscribe
Dashboard widgets that have no recent activity and suggest creating a first record
Admin tables after applying restrictive filters, prompting the user to broaden their criteria
usage: import { EmptyState, EmptyStateIcon, EmptyStateTitle, EmptyStateDescription, EmptyStateAction } from "shadcn-solid-components/hoc/empty-state"
